tool.name: Dorado
tool.description: basecaller for raw Oxford Nanopore data

param.name: pod5_file
param.label: Raw pod5 file
param.help: Only pod5 is supported. You can convert fast5 to pod5 with the fast5 to pod5 tool.

data.name: out_bam
data.label: Reads from ${on_string} basecalled by ${tool.name} with model ${model.fields.name}
